narrative:
North Canton 4-C (precinct in Stark County) has 1,311 registered voters, with 50.6% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 28.1% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 21.2%, a clear Republican lean of 6.9 percentage points.
